theorySection.label: Trading Insights
theorySection.title: Understanding GANN Hexagonal Support & Resistance
theorySection.subtitle: Learn how GANN's mathematical approach can help identify key price levels.

cards.title: What is the GANN Hexagon?
cards.description: The GANN Hexagon is a geometric chart that arranges numbers in a hexagonal pattern. W.D. GANN believed that prices move in natural geometric patterns and that certain angles and ratios create predictable support and resistance zones.

cards.title: Support Levels
cards.description: Support levels are price points where buying pressure overcomes selling pressure. Our calculator identifies multiple support levels below your input price, helping you set stop-loss orders and identify potential entry points.

cards.title: Resistance Levels
cards.description: Resistance levels are price points where selling pressure overcomes buying pressure. Our calculator identifies key resistance levels above your price, helping you take profits and identify potential breakout levels.

cards.title: Vibration Theory
cards.description: GANN believed that everything in the universe vibrates at specific frequencies. Applied to markets, this means prices move in predictable patterns based on mathematical ratios. The hexagon captures these natural vibrations.

useCasesSection.title: Who Can Use This Calculator?
useCasesSection.description: From day traders to long-term investors, GANN analysis helps everyone.
useCasesSection.label: Perfect for Analysis

useCases.title: Day Traders
useCases.description: Identify intraday support and resistance levels for quick trading decisions.

useCases.title: Swing Traders
useCases.description: Find multi-day support and resistance levels for swing trading strategies.

useCases.title: Investors
useCases.description: Use GANN levels for long-term investment decisions and portfolio management.

useCases.title: Students & Educators
useCases.description: Learn about GANN theory and technical analysis in trading courses.

faqs.question: What is the GANN Hexagonal Calculator?
faqs.answer: The GANN Hexagonal Calculator is a tool based on W.D. GANN's mathematical trading theory. It calculates support and resistance levels using hexagonal geometry and vibration ratios to help traders identify potential price turning points.

faqs.question: How do I use the GANN Calculator?
faqs.answer: Simply enter any price or number in the input field and click "Calculate". The tool will display multiple resistance levels (above your input) and support levels (below your input) based on GANN's mathematical ratios.

faqs.question: What are support and resistance levels?
faqs.answer: Support levels are price points where buying pressure tends to exceed selling pressure, potentially stopping a decline. Resistance levels are price points where selling pressure tends to exceed buying pressure, potentially stopping an advance.

faqs.question: Is this calculator free to use?
faqs.answer: Yes, our GANN Calculator is completely free to use. No registration or account required. All calculations happen locally in your browser.

faqs.question: Can I use this for any type of trading?
faqs.answer: This calculator works with any numerical scale - stocks, forex, commodities, cryptocurrencies, or any numerical analysis. It's particularly popular among technical analysts and swing traders.

faqs.question: How does PDF compression work?
faqs.answer: Our PDF compressor uses advanced algorithms to reduce the file size of your PDF documents. It removes unnecessary data, optimizes images, and compresses fonts while maintaining document quality.

faqs.question: Will the compression affect my document quality?
faqs.answer: Our compression tool is designed to maintain the best possible quality while reducing file size. You can choose between low, medium, and high compression levels depending on your needs.

faqs.question: Is my data secure?
faqs.answer: Yes, all PDF compression happens in your browser. Your files are not uploaded to our servers, ensuring complete privacy and security.

faqs.question: How much can I reduce my PDF file size?
faqs.answer: The compression ratio depends on the content of your PDF. Files with many images can typically be reduced by 50-90%, while text-only PDFs may see smaller reductions.

faqs.question: Do I need to create an account to use this tool?
faqs.answer: No, our PDF Compress Tool is completely free and doesn't require any registration or account creation.

faqs.question: How to compress a PDF file online?
faqs.answer: Upload your PDF file, choose compression level, and download the compressed version.

faqs.question: Does compression reduce quality?
faqs.answer: Our smart compression maintains the best possible quality while reducing file size.

faqs.question: How does image compression work?
faqs.answer: Our image compressor uses advanced algorithms to reduce file size while maintaining visual quality. It optimizes the image data, reduces colors where possible, and removes unnecessary metadata.

faqs.question: Will compression affect image quality?
faqs.answer: Our compression is designed to maintain the best possible quality while reducing file size. You can adjust the quality slider to balance between file size and image quality.

faqs.question: What image formats are supported?

faqs.question: Is my data secure?

faqs.question: How to format JSON online?
faqs.answer: Simply paste your JSON data into the input area and click 'Format JSON'. Your data will be instantly formatted with proper indentation and syntax highlighting.

faqs.question: Is this JSON formatter free?
faqs.answer: Yes! Our JSON formatter is completely free to use with no limitations. You can format as many JSON files as you need without any signup.

faqs.question: Is my JSON data secure?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! All formatting happens locally in your browser. Your JSON data is never uploaded to our servers, ensuring complete privacy and security.

faqs.question: Can this tool detect JSON errors?
faqs.answer: Yes! Our formatter automatically detects syntax errors in your JSON and displays helpful error messages to help you fix them.

faqs.question: What is JSON formatting?
faqs.answer: JSON formatting (also called beautifying or prettifying) adds proper indentation, spacing, and line breaks to make JSON data more readable for humans.

faqs.question: Can I minify JSON as well?
faqs.answer: Yes! Our tool can also minify JSON by removing all unnecessary whitespace, which is useful for reducing file size in production.
